pattern: Tracking the running prefix sum modulo k turns the search for a length-two-or-more multiple-of-k subarray into spotting a repeated remainder at least two indices apart.
hints: A subarray sum is a multiple of k exactly when the two surrounding prefix sums leave the same remainder when divided by k.
Store the earliest index at which each remainder first appears so any later match guarantees a subarray of length at least two.
Iterate prefix sums mod k, seeding remainder zero at index -1; if a remainder has been seen before and the index gap is at least two, return true.

edge_inputs.description: whole array is a multiple of k
single zero cannot form length-two subarray
two zeros sum to a multiple of any k
zeros adjacent give a multiple even for large k
remainder repeats but only adjacent index, still length two

stress.description: random non-negative arrays with a moderate k to hit and miss matches
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    nums = [rng.randrange(0, 50) for _ in range(n)]
    k = rng.randrange(1, 20)
    return [nums, k]
